Description: Site ID. Must match values in site metadata.
Activity type, eg Field Msr/Obs, Sample-Routine, Quality Control Field Replicate Msr/Obs. To avoid skewing data, quality control samples are excluded from analysis.
Depth at which sample was collected. Used to calculate Depth_Category if Depth_Category is blank.
Depth unit. Mandatory if "Depth" is filled out. Accepted values: feet, meters
Depth category. Standard values: Surface, Midwater, Near Bottom, Bottom

Lower detection limit. If the qualifier code indicates a result is below the detection limit, it will be set to half the detection limit. If this value is blank, results below the detection limit will be set to 0.

Upper detection limit. If the qualifier code indicates a result is above the detection limit, it will be set to the upper detection limit. If this value is blank, results above the detection limit will be excluded from analysis.
Unit for the lower and upper detection limits. Mandatory if "Lower_Detection_Limit" or "Upper_Detection_Limit" is filled out.

Qualifier code. If the qualifier code indicates a result is above or below the detection limit, the result value will be modified (see "Lower_Detection_Limit", "Upper_Detection_Limit"). Results that have any other qualifier code are excluded from analysis.
